children.heading: Access request
children.label: 1 Access request
children.text: The term “access request” means a request to a Federal reserve bank for access to a reserve bank master account and services, including any written documentation or formal indication that an entity intends to seek access to a reserve bank master account and services.

children.label: A
children.text: a foreign state, as defined in ;section 632 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: a central bank, as defined in , other than a commercial bank;section 632 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: a public international organization entitled to enjoy privileges, exemptions, and immunities as an international organization under the International Organizations Immunities Act ( et seq.); and22 U.S.C. 288

children.label: D
children.text: any governmental entity for which the Secretary of the Treasury has directed a Federal reserve bank to receive deposits as fiscal agent of the United States under .section 391 of this title

children.heading: Reserve bank master account and services
children.label: 3 Reserve bank master account and services
A
children.text: receives deposits for an entity other than an official accountholder; or

children.label: B
children.text: provides any service under to an entity other than an official accountholder.section 248a(b) of this title

children.heading: Publishing master account and access information
children.label: b Publishing master account and access information
A
children.text: a list of every entity that currently has access to a reserve bank master account and services, including the date on which the access was granted to the extent the date is knowable;

children.label: ii
children.text: was approved, rejected, pending, or withdrawn; and

children.label: i
children.text: an insured depository institution, as defined in ;section 1813 of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: an insured credit union, as defined in ; orsection 1752 of this title

children.label: iii
children.text: a depository institution that is not an insured depository institution or an insured credit union.

children.heading: Updates
children.label: 2 Updates
children.text: Not less frequently than once every quarter, the Board shall update the database to add any new information required under paragraph (1).

children.heading: Deadline
children.label: 3 Deadline
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , the Board shall publish the database with the information required under paragraph (1).December 23, 2022
